name: animated-tabs
title: Animated Tabs
description: A sliding pill tabset powered by shared layout animation.
docs:
# Animated Tabs A sliding pill tabset powered by shared layout animation. ## Import ```tsx import { AnimatedTabs } from "@/components/ui/animated-tabs"; ``` ## Usage ```tsx "use client"; Design content

}, { id: "motion", label: "Motion", content:

Motion content

}, ]} /> ``` ## Props - **defaultTab** (string) — default: `"design"`: Default tab - **label** (string): Trigger label > Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component. Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config. ## Install ```bash npx aurora-ui-cli add animated-tabs # or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init): npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/animated-tabs ```
